use_cases: Display placeholder shapes while content is being fetched from an API
Improve perceived loading performance by showing immediate visual feedback
Reduce layout shift by reserving space for incoming content
Indicate loading states for avatar, title, text, and media content areas
Provide accessible loading feedback during async operations
ai_summary: A minimalist skeleton loading component with configurable variants for avatar, title, text, and media placeholders. Uses subtle pulse animation to indicate loading states without distracting from the UI. Designed as a foundational building block for creating loading states across any interface.
